info.title: ImmoAgent API
info.description: German real estate investment analysis with AI

get.description: Aggregate statistics across the full property database. Public.
Paginated property listing with optional filters. Public — no auth required.

post.description: Kick off a pipeline scrape run in the background. Protected — requires Bearer token.

get.description: Full property details with all valuations. Public — no auth required.

post.description: Submit user feedback. Protected — requires Bearer token.
Join the feature waitlist. Public — no auth required. Silently ignores duplicates.
Save a property to the user's watchlist and trigger compact analysis in the background.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's portfolio with property details and latest compact analysis.

put.description: Update the pipeline status, notes, or purchase price of a portfolio entry.

delete.description: Remove a property from the user's portfolio.

get.description:
Return the latest compact analysis for a property.
Returns {status: "not_generated"} if the background task hasn't finished yet.
Frontend polls this every 3 seconds after calling watch.

post.description:
Run a full deep analysis on a property.
Returns a cached result (cached=true) if one was generated in the last 24 hours.
Otherwise calls Claude Sonnet and persists a fresh analysis.

get.description: Return the most recent deep analysis for a property. 404 if none exists yet.
Return raw DB aggregation stats for a city instantly — no AI, no cache.

Return a full AI market analysis for a city.
Served from cache if < 7 days old; otherwise generates a fresh one via Claude Sonnet.
Public — no auth required.
Return the most recent portfolio analysis for the authenticated user. 404 if none exists.

post.description:
Generate a fresh portfolio analysis for the authenticated user.
Loads all their watchlisted properties, calculates metrics, and asks
Claude Sonnet to rank them and produce a strategy recommendation.
Returns 400 if the user has no portfolio items.

Save a scenario to the database. Recalculates Python metrics from params —
no AI call, so this is instant. AI commentary is ephemeral and not stored.

Run a what-if scenario. Returns calculated metrics + Claude Haiku commentary.
Target latency < 3 seconds. Does NOT save — call /save to persist.

get.description: Return all saved scenarios for a property, newest first.

Return the last 20 conversation messages for a context key
(context_type + context_id), oldest first.

delete.description: Delete all conversation messages for a context key.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's investor profile, or {exists: false} if none configured.

post.description:
Create or update the authenticated user's investor profile (upsert).
Only fields explicitly provided in the request body are updated.

get.description:
Return the top 10 available properties best matching the user's investment criteria.

Scores each property 0–100 across four criteria:
  1. Gross yield >= target_yield_percent
  2. Asking price <= max_purchase_price
  3. City in preferred_cities (or no preference set)
  4. Property type in preferred_property_types (or no preference set)

Properties already in the user's portfolio are excluded.
Falls back to ranking by gross yield if no profile exists.

post.description:
Generate and save a personalised investment strategy via Claude Sonnet.
Calculates financial capacity in Python first, then sends to Claude.
Returns 400 if the user has no investor profile.

get.description: Return the latest saved strategy. 404 if none — POST /api/strategy/generate first.

post.description:
Generate a negotiation brief for a property via Claude Sonnet.

Calculates valuation gap, gross yield at asking, and seller urgency in Python
first, then sends everything to Claude for a targeted negotiation strategy.
Returns 404 if the property does not exist.

get.description: Return the most recent negotiation brief for a property. 404 if none exists yet.
